title: Croatia men's national junior ice hockey team
summary: The Croatian men's national under 20 ice hockey team is the national under-20 ice hockey team in Croatia. The team represents Croatia at the International Ice Hockey Federation's World Junior Hockey Championship Division I.
text:
The Croatian men's national under 20 ice hockey team is the national under-20 ice hockey team in Croatia. The team represents Croatia at the International Ice Hockey Federation's World Junior Hockey Championship Division I.
